requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — Guinea Project Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——几内亚项目证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——幾內亞項目證據

summary.en: A Guinea EVSE-specific mandatory safety regulation could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14. For credible imports, donor projects, fleet deployments, and IEC-aligned tenders, IEC 61851-1 should be treated as the baseline for conductive EV supply equipment safety, covering control pilot behavior, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, emergency stop where applicable, and installation instructions. IEC 61851-23 applies to DC EV charging stations. Outdoor equipment in Guinea should also address humidity, rain, dust, corrosion, surge exposure, ventilation, insect ingress, and enclosure protection using IEC 60529 IP evidence where specified.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认几内亚专门针对EVSE的强制安全法规。对于可信进口、援助项目、车队部署和IEC体系招标，应将IEC 61851-1视为传导式电动汽车供电设备安全基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护、适用时的急停，以及安装说明。IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车充电站。几内亚户外设备还应针对湿度、雨水、粉尘、腐蚀、浪涌暴露、通风、虫害进入和外壳防护提供IEC 60529 IP证据（如项目要求）。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認幾內亞專門針對EVSE的強制安全法規。對於可信進口、援助項目、車隊部署和IEC體系招標，應將IEC 61851-1視為傳導式電動汽車供電設備安全基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護、適用時的急停，以及安裝說明。IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車充電站。幾內亞戶外設備還應針對濕度、雨水、粉塵、腐蝕、浪湧暴露、通風、蟲害進入和外殼防護提供IEC 60529 IP證據（如項目要求）。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
IGNM national standardization adoption or project specification to be confirmed

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but includes China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence can support an engineering gap review but does not itself prove IEC 61851 compliance for a Guinea importer, tender, EDG-connected site, or third-party project owner.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号和通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可支持工程差距审查，但其本身不能证明面向几内亚进口商、招标、EDG接入现场或第三方项目业主的IEC 61851符合性。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號和通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可支持工程差距審查，但其本身不能證明面向幾內亞進口商、招標、EDG接入現場或第三方項目業主的IEC 61851符合性。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, enclosure IP certificates, protective-device ratings, surge-protection design, corrosion and humidity review, thermal derating, French or bilingual instructions where required, and installation guidance for weak-grid sites. A standalone GB/T 18487 report is not enough without a clause-level IEC gap assessment.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可IEC安全测试报告、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、外壳IP证书、保护器件额定值、浪涌保护设计、腐蚀和湿度评估、热降额、要求时的法语或双语说明，以及弱电网现场安装指引。单独的GB/T 18487报告在没有逐条IEC差距评估的情况下并不足够。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可IEC安全測試報告、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、外殼IP證書、保護器件額定值、浪湧保護設計、腐蝕和濕度評估、熱降額、要求時的法語或雙語說明，以及弱電網現場安裝指引。單獨的GB/T 18487報告在沒有逐條IEC差距評估的情況下並不足夠。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / project-driven — IEC 61851 evidence is expected where adopted by INGM, required by tender or owner specification, or requested for EDG-connected installations; exact EVSE-specific national mandate could not be confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not direct IEC 61851 evidence without additional assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design reference only. Guinea-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851 safety evidence, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence where applicable, enclosure protection, and humid / dusty site derating.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计参考。面向几内亚的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851安全证据、适用时的直流站IEC 61851-23证据、外壳防护，以及潮湿 / 粉尘现场降额。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計參考。面向幾內亞的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851安全證據、適用時的直流站IEC 61851-23證據、外殼防護，以及潮濕 / 粉塵現場降額。
